description_long: This is a vintage-style perfume bottle with a hexagonal base and a tall, narrow neck topped by a cylindrical cap. The bottle is made of opaque, marbled glass in shades of brown and beige, giving it an antique appearance. The front features a large, ornate label with the text 'No. 4711' and 'EAU DE COLOGNE' in decorative fonts, surrounded by intricate scrollwork and patterns. Additional circular motifs and portrait medallions are visible on the sides, adding to the bottle's decorative appeal. The cap appears to be made of the same marbled glass as the body and is likely removable. The overall design is elegant and reminiscent of early 20th-century cologne bottles, with a focus on both function and visual ornamentation.
description: A vintage, hexagonal perfume bottle with a marbled brown glass body, ornate label, and decorative motifs. The tall neck and matching cap enhance its antique, elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ornate label with 'No. 4711' and 'EAU DE COLOGNE' text, surrounded by decorative scrollwork.
description_view_1: Side view reveals more of the marbled glass surface and partial circular motifs, with less visible label detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plainest side, with faint label text and minimal decoration.
description_view_3: Opposite side highlights additional circular motifs and portrait medallions, with partial label text visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The front label features a large oval emblem with the text 'No. 4711' in stylized script, surrounded by ornate scrollwork and the words 'EAU DE COLOGNE' above. The logo is centrally placed and visually prominent.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The cap is cylindrical, made of the same marbled brown and beige glass as the bottle, and sits flush atop the neck. It appears to be removable and has a smooth, slightly glossy finish with no visible decorative elements or mechanisms.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottle has a hexagonal silhouette with straight vertical sides, a broad shoulder tapering to a narrow neck, and a cylindrical cap. The overall outline is symmetrical and faceted.
attribute_decorative_elements: Circular portrait medallions on the sides
